subcodes.first_line: We have sent down the verses and manifested the clear proofs, and have summoned all unto God, the Lord of Names and Attributes. The Cause of God hath come [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد انزلنا الایات و اظهرنا البینات و دعونا الکل الی الله مالک الاسما و الصفات قد اتی امر الله
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
